title: EpisodeInfo
description: Business-supplied metadata for a single short-drama episode. The short-drama SDK (media3-shortdrama) consumes this via the EpisodeSource interface. Only episodeId, playUrl and durationMs are required; the remaining fields feed Phase-2 features (ConnectionWarmer, RebufferWatchdog) and may be null or absent in Phase 1.

episodeId.description: Stable unique identifier used in every TTFF / DRM metric event emitted for this episode.

playUrl.description: Single-bitrate HLS media playlist URL. The business has already selected the ladder rung based on client-reported network / device info; the SDK does NOT parse a master playlist or perform adaptive bitrate switching.

coverUrl.description: Optional episode cover image URL. Default is a JPEG extracted from the source's first frame; operators may replace it via the management page.

width.description: Source video codec width in pixels (not display dimension; SAR-corrected width is left to the client). May be null for episodes uploaded before this field existed.

height.description: Source video codec height in pixels (not display dimension). May be null for episodes uploaded before this field existed.

initUrl.description: Optional CMAF init.mp4 URL for the selected rung. Reserved for Phase-2 byte-level prewarming; Phase 1 ignores this field.

firstSegUrl.description: Optional first media segment URL for the selected rung. Reserved for Phase-2 ConnectionWarmer.

drm.description: AES-128 key material. Absent or null when the episode is clear content.

keyUri.description: Exact value of #EXT-X-KEY:URI in the media playlist. Used as the DrmKeyStore lookup key — MUST match the playlist verbatim (including query / fragment).

keyBase64.description: Base64-encoded 16-byte AES-128 key. Decoded length MUST be exactly 16 bytes.

ivHex.description: Optional explicit IV (32 hex chars / 16 bytes). When omitted the IV declared by #EXT-X-KEY:IV is used.

fallback.description: Optional lower / higher ladder playlists. Reserved for Phase-2 RebufferWatchdog.

subtitles.description: Side-loaded subtitle tracks (one per language). Empty / no subtitles → null. Players attach these to the playback session as text tracks; they are NOT inlined in the HLS playlist.

langCode.description: BCP-47-style language code matching a row in the server's languages registry (e.g. zh-rCN, en, ja-JP).

label.description: Display label for the subtitle picker, sourced from languages.display_label.

url.description: WebVTT file URL. Host-relative when served by the business host (default); future OSS staging-prod separation may move to absolute OSS URLs.
